name: To Fly with You
overview: Shen Zhengyi, a passionate ice skater, strives to become a professional short-track speed skater by joining the Zhu Feng Sports Club. Despite lacking formal training, she overcomes physical and mental challenges, earning her teammates' trust and becoming a standout competitor. Along the way, she uncovers past secrets involving her mother and coach Zhuang Yue, forming a strong teacher-student bond as both generations fight for their dreams.

trailers.title: 《陪你逐风飞翔》To Fly With You 终极预告 Final Trailer
